description: Add npm keywords to all plugins from ebay through linkedin to improve discoverability on npm search. Extends existing keywords array with MCP and AI agent related terms.
qualityChecks: echo 'Verifying package.json changes...' && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const plugins=['ebay','excel-online','expedia','facebook','fidelity','figma','gemini','github','gitlab','google-analytics','google-calendar','google-cloud','google-drive','google-maps','grafana','hackernews','homedepot','instacart','instagram','jira','leetcode','linear','linkedin'];let ok=true;for(const p of plugins){const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('plugins/'+p+'/package.json','utf8'));if(!pkg.keywords||pkg.keywords.length<2){console.error(p+': missing keywords');ok=false;}if(!pkg.keywords.includes('mcp')){console.error(p+': missing mcp keyword');ok=false;}}if(!ok)process.exit(1);console.log('All plugins in batch 2 have correct keywords');"

userStories.title: Add npm keywords to plugins ebay through linkedin
userStories.description: Add MCP and AI agent related keywords to the keywords array in all 23 plugin package.json files from ebay through linkedin (alphabetical). Each plugin currently has keywords: ["opentabs-plugin"]. Add additional keywords for npm discoverability.
acceptanceCriteria: Every plugin package.json in the batch has keywords array containing at minimum: opentabs-plugin, opentabs, mcp, modelcontextprotocol, chrome-extension, ai-agent, browser-automation
The existing opentabs-plugin keyword is preserved (first position)
No other fields in any package.json are modified

All 23 plugins are updated: ebay, excel-online, expedia, facebook, fidelity, figma, gemini, github, gitlab, google-analytics, google-calendar, google-cloud, google-drive, google-maps, grafana, hackernews, homedepot, instacart, instagram, jira, leetcode, linear, linkedin
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/ebay/package.json
- plugins/excel-online/package.json
- plugins/expedia/package.json
- plugins/facebook/package.json
- plugins/fidelity/package.json
- plugins/figma/package.json
- plugins/gemini/package.json
- plugins/github/package.json
- plugins/gitlab/package.json
- plugins/google-analytics/package.json
- plugins/google-calendar/package.json
- plugins/google-cloud/package.json
- plugins/google-drive/package.json
- plugins/google-maps/package.json
- plugins/grafana/package.json
- plugins/hackernews/package.json
- plugins/homedepot/package.json
- plugins/instacart/package.json
- plugins/instagram/package.json
- plugins/jira/package.json
- plugins/leetcode/package.json
- plugins/linear/package.json
- plugins/linkedin/package.json

Context:
All plugins currently have `"keywords": ["opentabs-plugin"]`. We need to add discoverability keywords so these show up when people search npm for MCP-related packages. The `opentabs-plugin` keyword must remain (it's used for npm auto-discovery by the MCP server).

Changes:
For each plugin, change the keywords array from:
```json
"keywords": [
    "opentabs-plugin"
]
```
To:
```json
"keywords": [
    "opentabs-plugin",
    "opentabs",
    "mcp",
    "modelcontextprotocol",
    "chrome-extension",
    "ai-agent",
    "browser-automation"
]
```

The pattern is identical for every plugin in this batch. Use a script or manual editing — the change is the same for all 23 files.

Constraints:
- Do NOT modify any field other than keywords
- Do NOT change the description, opentabs field, or any other package.json content
- Keep `opentabs-plugin` as the first keyword (it's used for npm auto-discovery)
- Keep JSON formatting consistent: 2-space indent, keywords array with each entry on its own line (matching existing style)
- Do NOT touch plugins/e2e-test (not in this batch anyway)
